title: Grid and Flexbox Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of one-dimensional (Flexbox) vs two-dimensional (Grid) layout roles and how to choose the right one for simple menus or complex dashboards.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primarily design philosophy of Flexbox?
options: One-dimensional layout (laying out items in a single row or column).

questions.question: Which and/or what was the primarily design philosophy of CSS Grid?
options: Two-dimensional layout (managing both rows and columns simultaneously).

questions.question: Which would you choose for a simple horizontal menu of five navigation links?
Which would you choose for a complex, responsive 12-column dashboard layout with nested sidebars?
Does using 'gap' instead of 'margin' in Flexbox and Grid improve spacing consistency in modern development?
options: Yes, as it only adds space between children without adding extra padding on the outside.
